flashcards.definition: Organic molecule (sugars, starches, cellulose) used for energy and structure; monomer: monosaccharide.
Hydrophobic organic molecules (fats, oils, waxes, phospholipids) for energy storage and membranes.
Polymers of amino acids; functions include enzymes, structure, transport, and defense.
DNA and RNA; polymers of nucleotides that store and transmit genetic information.
Monomer: a small repeating unit. Polymer: a large molecule made of linked monomers.
